_adjustmentsNote: Small per-minute nudges calibrated against namcc.org's published times (ISNA method matched within 1-2 min out of the box). Tweak here if the mosque's actual Adhan times drift from this over time.
_iqamahNote: Adhan (call to prayer) is auto-calculated daily. Iqamah (start of congregational prayer) is set by mosque staff and must be updated by hand here when it changes — Maghrib is the exception, kept as a fixed number of minutes after Adhan per standard practice.
